hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: A coin flip probability on a $45K Bitcoin dip by end of 2026 means smart money is genuinely split, which almost never happens when real macro conviction exists. The 10-point drop in 24 hours suggests weak hands are bailing on the YES side right as they should be accumulating it, signaling a potential mispricing if you believe Bitcoin volatility stays elevated through next year.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin $45K Floor Suddenly Less Certain. Smart Money Just Rotated Out.
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin's $45K dip odds collapsed 10 points overnight to 51%, signaling a sharp reversal in bearish positioning. The move reeks of forced liquidation or macro de-risking rather than fundamental conviction. At exactly even money, this feels like capitulation pricing, meaning the real edge is fading the panic and buying the bounce.

sidebar.headline: DHS shutdown optimism is real. Market priced a deal at 82% and just got confirmation bias. Watch if volume dries up, suggesting late money already positioned.
sidebar.label: DHS Shutdown Ends After March 31: 82.2%

sidebar.headline: Guardians at 6.2% is a sucker's bet. Four-point overnight surge suggests sharp action on AL East intel, not public news. Follow the volume before the odds compress further.
sidebar.label: Guardians Win 2026 ALCS: 6.2%

sidebar.headline: Anduril's IPO odds cratered 22 points in one day. That's not market recalibration, that's panic. Defense tech financing environment just tightened, but 18.5% might underweight the growth runway to 2027.
sidebar.label: Anduril IPO Before 2027: 18.5%
